$comment: Per-repo config for the org source-leak-gate caller (.github/workflows/source-leak-gate.yml). This repo carries a local copy of the actions-pinned-gate engine (scripts/audit/actions-pinned-gate.mjs + its test), whose source and tests necessarily contain the version-comment markers they enforce (`# vX.Y.Z` after a pinned SHA) — exactly like the source-leak scanner's own rule definitions contain the markers it detects. Those two files are exempted by basename, mirroring the identical exemption cinatra-ai/ci applies to its own copy in config/self-check.json. Nothing else is exempted.
